parameter.name: query
parameter.description: intent/keyword/noun, matched against toolName, verb, noun, description

actions.script: context.toolId = tool.toolId; context.toolName = tool.toolName context.description = tool.description; context.effect = tool.effectEnumId context.serviceName = tool.serviceName; context.exposable = tool.exposable // schema generated on demand from the live service definition (never stored) context.inputSchema = org.moqui.ai.ToolSchemaBuilder.build(ec.factory, tool.serviceName as String)

parameter.name: intent
parameter.description: what the user wants the agent to do

return.message: Agent ${agentId} has no grant for tool ${toolId}

service-call.name: create#moqui.ai.AiCapabilityRequest
service-call.in-map: [capabilityRequestId: capabilityRequestId, intent: intent, suggestedVerb: suggestedVerb, suggestedNoun: suggestedNoun, notes: notes, agentRunId: agentRunId, conversationId: conversationId, requestedByUserId: ec.user.userId, requestedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, statusId: 'AI_CAPREQ_OPEN']

return.message: Cannot activate: granted tool ${g.toolId} is not exposable/active
Refusing to discard a non-draft agent ${agentId}
